args:
set -eu
python3 -m py_compile vllm/setup.py vllm/vllm/build_profiles.py vllm/vllm/envs.py vllm/vllm/env_override.py vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
cd vllm
.venv-codex/bin/python -m pytest --noconftest tests/test_build_profiles.py tests/test_compile_factor_manifest_light.py tests/test_aot_artifact_manifest_light.py tests/test_patch_profile_manifest_light.py -q >/tmp/vllm-build-safe-pytest.txt
grep -q '14 passed' /tmp/vllm-build-safe-pytest.txt
cd ..
grep -q 'VLLM_BUILD_PROFILE' vllm/setup.py
grep -q 'option(VLLM_BUILD_TRITON_KERNELS' vllm/CMakeLists.txt
grep -q 'if(VLLM_BUILD_FLASH_ATTN)' vllm/CMakeLists.txt
grep -q 'standalone_compile_artifact_store_identity' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'standalone_compile_artifact_compatibility' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'standalone_compile_artifact_reuse_summary' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'standalone_compile_artifact_proof_manifest' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'def build_standalone_artifact_proof_manifest' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'def patch_profile_manifest' vllm/vllm/env_override.py
grep -q 'def fallback_namespace_manifest' vllm/vllm/env_override.py
grep -q 'def fallback_creation_evidence_manifest' vllm/vllm/env_override.py
printf 'vllm-build-safe\n'

set -eu
python3 -m py_compile vllm/setup.py vllm/vllm/build_profiles.py vllm/vllm/envs.py vllm/vllm/env_override.py vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
cd vllm
.venv-codex/bin/python -m pytest --noconftest tests/test_build_profiles.py tests/test_compile_factor_manifest_light.py tests/test_aot_artifact_manifest_light.py tests/test_patch_profile_manifest_light.py -q >/tmp/vllm-build-safe-pytest.txt
grep -q '14 passed' /tmp/vllm-build-safe-pytest.txt
cd ..
grep -q 'VLLM_BUILD_PROFILE' vllm/setup.py
grep -q 'option(VLLM_BUILD_TRITON_KERNELS' vllm/CMakeLists.txt
grep -q 'if(VLLM_BUILD_FLASH_ATTN)' vllm/CMakeLists.txt
grep -q 'standalone_compile_artifact_store_identity' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'standalone_compile_artifact_compatibility' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'standalone_compile_artifact_reuse_summary' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'standalone_compile_artifact_proof_manifest' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'def build_standalone_artifact_proof_manifest' vllm/vllm/compilation/caching.py
grep -q 'def patch_profile_manifest' vllm/vllm/env_override.py
grep -q 'def fallback_namespace_manifest' vllm/vllm/env_override.py
grep -q 'def fallback_creation_evidence_manifest' vllm/vllm/env_override.py
printf 'vllm-build-safe\n'
